title: Simple Harvesting
description: Harvest crops faster with auto-replant using right-click or a hoe.
body: This mod makes harvesting your crops faster and easier. ## **Features:** - **Simple Harvesting:** Right-click on a crop to harvest it and automatically replant the seeds. - **Area Harvest:** Right-click a crop with a hoe to harvest all nearby crops of the same type within a 3-block radius. ![Area Harvest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27fb80c0b0ad546e336a909a8b25f5424ba27c5b.webp) - **Remove Natural Plants:** Use a hoe to destroy any naturally growing plants on grass within a 2-block radius. ![Remove Natural Plants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/174adfbf13ccf11794b311dd6a9194fbd2e1d150.webp) In the minecraft config folder you can edit the radiuses of the features. If you find any issue you can report it here: [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/TheToicraft/Simple-Harvesting-Mod/issues/new)
